closed on federal holidays Email (503) 265-3501 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON PORTLAND FREE FILE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides qualifying taxpayers information and links to several options to prepare and file federal income tax returns online using guided tax preparation software for. Also offers Free File fillable forms for those who do not qualify for the service. 1220 SW 3rd Avenue Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Adjusted Gross Income (AGI) $84,000 or less Hours: 24 Hours per day / 7 days a week Email (503) 265-3501 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON SALEM OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with information about questions regarding adjustments to tax accounts, IRS notifications, tax payment plans, levies on wages or bank accounts, other tax-related issues, and consumer fraud. 1660 Oak Street SE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-12:30pm and 1:30pm-4:30pm; closed on federal holidays Email (844) 545-5640 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE STATE TAX ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Oregon Department of Revenue administers Oregon tax laws and collects taxes for over 30 programs. Taxes include, but are not limited to, business, personal income, property, timber, tobacco, state income, corporate, and inheritance tax. This office provides information about online tax filing. State tax refund status and information about outstanding state tax amounts due are available on the website. Provides free state tax payer information assistance year-round and state and federal free tax filing preparation referral during the federal tax season. 955 Center Street NE Salem, OR 973012555 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 673-0700 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE PROPERTY TAX EXEMPTION PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about exemption programs. There are over 100 programs in Oregon. Exemptions can be either full or partial, depending on the program requirements and the extent to which the property is used in a qualifying manner. Most exemptions granted to non-governmental entities are granted to religious, fraternal, literary, benevolent, or charitable organizations. The exempt property must be reasonably necessary and used in a way to achieve the organization’s purpose. Any portion of the property that does not meet the requirements of the exemption program is taxable. Some property is taxed at a reduced value through a special assessment program. In that case, the lower assessed value results in a reduced tax liability. Examples of special assessment programs include historic property, farmland, forest land, and conservation easement. 955 Center Street NE Salem, OR 973012555 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 378-4988 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE SENIOR AND DISABLED PROPERTY TAX DEFERRAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Qualified senior and disabled citizens can "borrow" from the State of Oregon to pay property taxes to the county. If approved, the Oregon Department of Revenue (DOR) will pay county property taxes on November 15 of each year. A lien is placed on the property and DOR becomes a security interest holder. 955 Center Street NE Salem, OR 973012555 Eligibility: Must be either 62 or older, or must be a disabled citizen who is receiving or is eligible to receive federal Social Security disability benefits. Also, must have a recorded deed to the property or be buying the property under a recorded sales contract. Certain trust or trustee arrangements qualify for deferral. Not eligible for deferral if person has a life estate interest in the property. See application for more eligibility requirements. Hours: File an application between January 1 and April 15 to defer the taxes due the following November 15 Email (503) 945-8348 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON OREGON INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF REVENUE STATE TAX ASSISTANCE
